title: Mekanism:MoreCapacity
body:
# Mekanism:MoreCapacity

This mod will allow some mekanism machines to change the capacity of their gas tanks and liquid tanks.
This can be freely changed from the config and defaults to 100 times the original.  
It can be expanded up to 9223372036854775807mB for Gas and 2147483647mB for Fluid.

This mod cannot run without the Mekanism  
## Supported Addons  
[Mekanism Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism_extra)  
[Mekanism:More Machine](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanismmoremachine)  
Evolved Mekanism (only curseforge)  
Mekanism Elements (only curseforge)
